Confirm tomorrow's lift is on the schedule (0/4 gym days logged this week) and put it in Hevy before you walk in.
Plan tomorrow's meals in advance to hit 2750 kcal / 215g protein / 310g carbs / 68g fat rather than reconstructing it after the fact.
